name: Party Crab Special
recipeInstructions:
1. Juice from one lemon
2. Soften gelatin in cold water.
3. Heat soup, mayonnaise, Worcestershire sauce, onion, and cream cheese in double boiler until cheese is melted.
4. Add gelatin and salt. Stir until dissolved.
5. Chill until partly set.
6. Fold in crab meat and celery.
7. Turn into a 1/2 quart mold and chill until firm.
8. Serve with crackers.
